name: yandex-metrica
description: Yandex Metrica web analytics via the mcp-yandex-metrica npm server with your OAuth token: counters, goals, traffic and conversion reports. Requires Node.js 18+.

token.title: Yandex Metrica OAuth token
token.description: OAuth token with Metrica read access — see github.com/askads/mcp-yandex-metrica for how to get one

counter_id.title: Default counter ID (optional)
counter_id.description: Metrica counter to use by default; leave empty to let the assistant pick from list_counters
